headline: Lamb Weston Holdings Plans To Close Production Facility In Broekhuizenvorst To Align Global Supply Chain Footprint With Evolving Market Conditions
summary: Proposed changes reflect actions to improve operational efficiency and better align the global manufacturing footprint with customer needsLamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:LW) today announced plans to close its production
